messages.content: write a winning speech for Guneet Monga Oscar win. Use the word audacious. It should be crafted like a message to young women.

My dear young women,

Today, something audacious happened. Today, Guneet Monga won an Oscar.

But this win is not just about Guneet. It's about every single one of us who have ever dared to dream big, to work hard, and to never give up.

Guneet's win is a reminder that audacity has no gender. It's a quality that resides in all of us, irrespective of our gender, and it's what takes us to greater heights.

So, to all the young women out there, I urge you to be audacious, to never give up on your dreams, and to always believe in yourself. It's easy to get bogged down by the challenges and hurdles that we face, but it's precisely these challenges that make us stronger and more resilient.

Guneet's win shows that there is nothing that can stop us once we set our minds to it. So, let's dream big, let's work hard, and let's make our mark in the world.

Thank you, Guneet Monga, for inspiring us all. And thank you, young women, for believing in yourselves and for being audacious.

Write this in a more inspiring tone : Guneet Monga dared to dream big. Like her, 10 other women are going the distance with their dreams, 
with the My Marie Startup Contest. Give 10 options for this.

Listen up, dreamers!

Guneet Monga dared to dream big and won an Oscar. She lit the path for all of us to follow and chase after what we desire. And now, there are 10 other amazing women following her footsteps and taking their dreams to the next level with the My Marie Startup Contest.

These 10 women are the embodiment of perseverance, courage, and passion. They have taken that first step towards creating something unique and are now reaching towards their goals with full force.

So, who are these daring trailblazers? Here are the 10 options to inspire you:

1. The app developer who wants to revolutionize the healthcare industry
2. The artist who wants to bring her paintings to life
3. The fashion designer who aims to create an inclusive fashion line for all body types
4. The social entrepreneur who is starting a non-profit to address a pressing societal issue
5. The writer who is working on her first book and hopes to inspire millions of readers
6. The eco-conscious entrepreneur working on a startup to reduce plastic waste
7. The tech-savvy innovator creating a new app to make our lives more convenient
8. The foodie creating a unique food product that caters to health-conscious eaters
9. The educator starting an online academy to make learning accessible to everyone
10. The fitness enthusiast creating a new fitness program that combines physical and mental wellness

So, if you have a dream that's worth chasing, then there's no better time than now to chase it. Remember, if Guneet Monga and these 10 women can go the distance with their dreams, then so can you. All it takes is the courage to take that first step.
write this in a more inspiring tone : Guneet Monga dared to dream big.

Listen up, dreamers of the world!

Guneet Monga dared to dream big, and she made it happen. Her audacity, her courage, and her relentless pursuit of her dream led her to the Oscars stage, where she made history.

But Guneet's dream was not just about her. It was a message to all of us that there are no limits to what we can achieve if we dare to dream big.

Guneet's journey is a testament to the power of dreams, the power of hard work, and the power of never giving up.

So, if you have a dream that's burning inside you, if you have a passion that you can't let go of, if you have a goal that seems out of reach, take inspiration from Guneet's audacious journey.

Believe in yourself, believe in your dream, and take that first step towards making it a reality. Remember, nothing is impossible if you have the will to make it happen. As the saying goes, "If you can dream it, you can achieve it."

So, go out there and dare to dream big, just like Guneet Monga did. The world is waiting for you to make your mark.
write a thank speech on behalf of Guneet Monga on thanking her parents who are no more. the words should be moving and emotional.

Dear all,

Today, I stand before you humbled and grateful for this incredible honor. I had dreamed of this moment, but never could have imagined that it would be possible.

As I stand here, I am reminded of the people who made it possible for me to be here today. My parents - my biggest cheerleaders, my pillars of strength, and my source of inspiration, who are no longer with us - this Oscar belongs to them as much as it belongs to me.

My parents led their lives with quiet dignity, sacrificed everything to give me the best of everything, and taught me the values of perseverance, hard work, and audacity. They always encouraged me to follow my dreams and never let anything come in the way.

Their unwavering support and unconditional love have been the driving force of my life, and it is a constant reminder that they are always with me, watching over me from above.

I would like to take a moment to thank them for all that they have done for me, for instilling the belief that I could do anything I set my mind to, and for being my guiding lights even though they are no longer with me.

To my parents - this Oscar is yours. Thank you for believing in me, for shaping me into who I am today, and for being my forever heroes.

Thank you all for your support and kindness.

write a speech as Guneet Monga talking to the young women to be audacious and show up. that their dreams are valid and they should fight for it. keep the speech short, moving, emotional and inspiring.

Dear young women,

I stand before you today as living proof of the power of audacity. I am a woman who dared to dream big, and who fought with all her might to make that dream a reality.

And I am here to tell you that your dreams are valid, that you are capable of achieving anything you set your mind to, and that the only thing standing in the way of your success is you.

You have everything within you to be audacious, to take the reins of your life, and to make it an unforgettable journey. And yet, so many of you hold yourselves back, afraid of taking that next step, afraid of what people might say.

But I am here to tell you that showing up is half the battle won. That taking that next step, no matter how scary it might seem, is the only way to truly live.

You are not defined by your circumstances, your gender, your background, or anything else. You are defined by your actions, by the way you show up in the world, and by the impact that you make.

So I urge you today to be audacious, to take that leap of faith, to believe in yourselves, and to fight for your dreams with all your might.

It won't be easy, but nothing worth having ever is. But I promise you, that if you show up every day, if you put in the work, if you never give up on yourself, you will achieve great things.

So go forth, young women, show up, be audacious, and live your best life. You have the power to create your own destiny, to make your dreams a reality. Don't let anyone tell you otherwise.

Thank you.
write a funny ad using Ariel liquid. the ad should be a 20 seconder. a fun script involving a lab coat researcher as well.

(Open on a white laboratory - a female scientist is standing at a table with beakers and tubes filled with brightly colored liquids. Ariel pods are in a separate box on the table)

Scientist: (wearily) Another day in the lab. One more stain to get out.

(She rolls her eyes slightly and picks up an beaker with a red liquid. It splashes onto her white lab coat with a big splat and a loud "uh-oh" sound effect)

Scientist: (groans) Just my luck.

(Music begins to play and she reaches for a bottle of Ariel liquid. Suddenly she starts grooving to the music in a dance-like fashion)

Scientist: (sings) With Ariel Liquid, stains can't hide!

(She adds a little shimmy to the beat and the scene fades to Ariel Liquid logo)

Voiceover: Ariel Liquid - the stain-busting hero for all your lab coats and clothes!
try more options. get creative and disruptive with the script.

(Open on a lab technician wearing a lab coat standing in the laboratory with a serious expression on her face. She holds a colorful beaker in her hand.)

Technician: (looking at the beaker) This is one tough stain. I don't think even science can get rid of it.

(Suddenly, a group of scientists enter the room with Ariel Liquid bottles in their hands.)

Scientist 1: (smiling) You don't believe in magic?

Technician: (confused) Magic?

Scientist 2: (excitedly) Ariel Liquid is the magic potion that can make any stain disappear.

(The lab technician pours Ariel Liquid onto the stubborn stain, and it instantly vanishes with a sizzle sound effect.)

Technician: (amazed) Wow, that was like magic!

Scientist 1: (winks at the camera) Science is the new magic.

(Ariel Liquid logo appears on the screen)

Voiceover: Ariel Liquid - the scientist's magic potion to make any stain disappear. Try it now and see the magic for yourself.
use a couple buying a new washing machine and subtlety include Ariel liquid in the 20 seconder ad.

(Open on a couple walking into a home appliance store. They stop in front of a row of washing machines and start browsing)

Woman: (excited) I can't wait to get a new washing machine. No more hand washing!

Man: (jokingly) Does that mean I get to retire my washboard?

Woman: (laughs) Yes, finally!

(Salesman approaches them)

Salesman: Can I help you guys find something?

Man: Yes, we want something that cleans clothes really well.

Salesman: (nodding) We have some great machines that fit your requirements. But to get the best results, you'll also need the best detergent.

(Woman looks a little confused)

Man: (also a bit confused) What do you mean?

Salesman: (pointing to Ariel Liquid detergent) Ariel Liquid - it's the #1 detergent brand recommended by top washing machine manufacturers.

Woman: (impressed) I need that.

Man: (smiling) Oh, so now Ariel Liquid is part of the retirement plan?

(Everyone laughs)

(Ariel Liquid logo appears on the screen)

Voiceover: For a washing machine that cleans your clothes really well, choose Ariel Liquid detergent.
Is there anything else you would like me to write?

solve this. we need to use Guneet Monga on the front page with her Oscar in hand. but due to legality issue, we can't. What else can be used as a prop to showcase that Britannia is giving Guneet Monga a chance to finish her Oscar speech that was cut off.

Instead of using Guneet Monga's Oscar to represent the opportunity, you could use a microphone to represent the chance for her to finish her Oscar speech that was cut off. The microphone could be shown on the front page with the Britannia logo on it, indicating that Britannia is giving her the platform to complete her speech. Alternatively, a blank Oscar statue could be used, with the Britannia logo alongside it, to show that they are providing Guneet Monga with an opportunity to complete an important milestone.
what more can we use?

Another way to represent the chance for Guneet Monga to finish her Oscar speech could be by using an open book as a prop. The book could be titled "Guneet Monga's Oscar Speech" and could be shown with the Britannia logo on it, suggesting that Britannia is helping to provide the platform to complete the speech. Another prop that could be used is a spotlight or stage light, indicating that Guneet Monga is being given the chance to shine and complete her inspiring remarks with the help of Britannia.
what else?

Another great way to represent the chance for Guneet Monga to finish her Oscar speech could be to use a clock or a timepiece as a prop. The clock or watch could be shown stopped at the time when Guneet Monga was cut off during her speech. The Britannia logo could be featured alongside the clock, indicating that Guneet Monga is being given the opportunity to finish her speech and make her voice heard. This representation could be symbolic of Britannia giving her the "time" she deserves to share her inspiring message with the world.
that is great, tell me more about the clock. how can use it as a print ad?

For the print ad, the clock could be portrayed as a vintage design inspired by the old Hollywood era's classic movies that fascinate the audience. The clock can show the exact time when Guneet Monga's speech was cut off during the Oscars with Britannia's logo beside the clock. Around the clock, the tagline can say, "Time is on Guneet Monga's side," followed by the copy that mentions how Britannia is providing her with the time she needs to complete her inspiring Oscar Speech. The use of a vintage clock design will evoke nostalgia and connect with the audience emotionally, making the viewers realize the vital importance of having a voice and a platform to express one's views.
what more?

Another way to use the clock as a print ad is to create an image of Britannia giving Guneet Monga a new clock that symbolizes a fresh start and a second chance to complete her Oscar speech. In the ad, Guneet Monga could be portrayed holding the clock with a smile on her face, standing on a stage with the Britannia logo in the background. The image could be accompanied by a tagline such as: "Britannia gives Guneet Monga the time and platform to complete her inspiring Oscar speech." This image will show the positive contribution that Britannia makes towards creativity, arts, and encouraging young voices to be heard.
what's the best way of showcasing Guneet Monga on a front page print ad?

Since you cannot use Guneet Monga's Oscar on the front page due to legal issues, you can showcase her on the front page through a powerful image that captures her spirit and conveys the message of her inspiring journey. The image could be a profile shot of Guneet Monga with a determined look on her face, dressed in a smart casual business attire. She could be standing in front of a backdrop featuring several shots showing different moments of her life's journey. The backdrop could show her working on film sets, taking notes during a meeting, or giving an instruction to a team of filmmakers. The Britannia logo could be incorporated into the backdrop, showing that Britannia has been an integral part of her journey. 

The tagline for the ad could be "Guneet Monga: Audacity in Action," with the copy highlighting her journey, struggles, and victories in the film industry. This approach will not only showcase Guneet Monga's contribution to the film industry but it will also strengthen the connection between Guneet Monga and Britannia, inspiring the target audience to take bold steps towards their dreams.
Love audacity in action. come up with more such captions.

10. The Audacious Visionary: Guneet Monga Paving the Way in Film Industry.
write a much more moving line than just Guneet Monga dared to dream big.
"Guneet Monga's journey proves that no dream is too audacious and no barrier is too great when we have the courage to fight for what we believe in."
give me more options like this.

1. "Guneet Monga's incredible story inspires us to believe in the impossible and take bold steps towards our dreams." 
2. "From humble beginnings to global recognition, Guneet Monga reminds us that audacity, hard work, and unwavering perseverance are the keys to success." 
3. "Guneet Monga's journey is a testament to the power of resilience, determination, and the audacity to challenge norms and pursue one's dreams." 
4. "Guneet Monga's inspiring journey is a testament to how one's passion and audacity can lead to significant achievements that have the power to transform the world." 
5. "Guneet Monga's unwavering spirit and audacity to challenge the status quo uplift us, encourage us, and remind us to never give up on our dreams."
make it short, crispy and inspiring.
"Guneet Monga's audacious vision inspires us to believe that anything is possible when we dare to dream big."
more short - stick to 5-6 words.
"Audacity is Guneet Monga."
more like these.

2. "Inspire audacity with Guneet."
